ModMetaData.name: Abyssal Protocol
ModMetaData.author: Neversalimus
ModMetaData.description:
A techno-demonic RimWorld endgame mod built around controlled summoning, abyssal progression, and custom boss encounters.
Current state: Pre-Alpha / First Vertical Slice.
Already implemented in the current repository: - abyssal summoning infrastructure - early research and ritual crafting - custom hostile abyssal entities - a working first boss encounter - portal-based escalation content - early custom weapons and implant rewards - custom code, textures, sounds, and EN/RU localization
This is already a playable vertical slice, not just a framework or concept mockup. The mod is not content-complete yet: broader progression, more rituals, more enemies, more bosses, and wider endgame reward structure are still in active development.
